# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/nick/rdkit-ocaml/build/rdkit
# It was generated by CMake: /nix/store/q800b7nrqa8csf2gcds2i83w1icsda5w-cmake-4.1.2/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.

//Enables QUIET option for all content population

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of better_enums

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of Catch2

//install support for the avalon toolkit. Use the variable AVALONTOOLS_DIR
// to set the location of the source.
RDK_BUILD_AVALON_SUPPORT:BOOL=OFF

//build support for Cairo drawing
RDK_BUILD_CAIRO_SUPPORT:BOOL=OFF

//build the CFFI wrapper (for use in other programming languges)
RDK_BUILD_CFFI_LIB:BOOL=ON

//build support for the Revvity ChemDraw document format
RDK_BUILD_CHEMDRAW_SUPPORT:BOOL=ON

//build in support for compressed MolSuppliers
RDK_BUILD_COMPRESSED_SUPPLIERS:BOOL=OFF

//build the Contrib directory
RDK_BUILD_CONTRIB:BOOL=OFF

//build the rdkit coordgen wrapper
RDK_BUILD_COORDGEN_SUPPORT:BOOL=ON

//build the c++ tests (disabing can speed up builds
RDK_BUILD_CPP_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Build the 3D descriptors calculators, requires Eigen3 to be installed
RDK_BUILD_DESCRIPTORS3D:BOOL=ON

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
RDK_BUILD_DOCS:UNINITIALIZED=OFF

//build the DotNet Core tests for C# wrappers on Linux (does nothing
// if RDK_BUILD_SWIG_CSHARP_WRAPPER is not set and is ignored on
// Windows)
RDK_BUILD_DOTNET_CSHARP_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//build the rdkit freesasa wrapper
RDK_BUILD_FREESASA_SUPPORT:BOOL=OFF

//build support for FreeType font handling
RDK_BUILD_FREETYPE_SUPPORT:BOOL=ON

//build the fuzz targets
RDK_BUILD_FUZZ_TARGETS:BOOL=OFF

//build the rdkit inchi wrapper
RDK_BUILD_INCHI_SUPPORT:BOOL=OFF

//build longer running tests
RDK_BUILD_LONG_RUNNING_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//build the rdkit MAE parser wrapper
RDK_BUILD_MAEPARSER_SUPPORT:BOOL=ON

//build the minimal RDKit wrapper (for the JS bindings)
RDK_BUILD_MINIMAL_LIB:BOOL=OFF

//build support for MCS into MinimalLib
RDK_BUILD_MINIMAL_LIB_MCS:BOOL=OFF

//build support for MMPA into MinimalLib
RDK_BUILD_MINIMAL_LIB_MMPA:BOOL=OFF

//build support for molzip into MinimalLib
RDK_BUILD_MINIMAL_LIB_MOLZIP:BOOL=OFF

//build support for reactions into MinimalLib
RDK_BUILD_MINIMAL_LIB_RXN:BOOL=ON

//build support for SubstructLibrary into MinimalLib
RDK_BUILD_MINIMAL_LIB_SUBSTRUCTLIBRARY:BOOL=ON

//build in support for CommonChem molecule interchange
RDK_BUILD_MOLINTERCHANGE_SUPPORT:BOOL=ON

//build the PostgreSQL cartridge
RDK_BUILD_PGSQL:BOOL=OFF

//build the rdkit wrapper around pubchem-align3d
RDK_BUILD_PUBCHEMSHAPE_SUPPORT:BOOL=ON

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
RDK_BUILD_PYCAIRO:UNINITIALIZED=OFF

//build the standard python wrappers
RDK_BUILD_PYTHON_WRAPPERS:BOOL=OFF

//build the QT drawing demo
RDK_BUILD_QT_DEMO:BOOL=OFF

//build support for QT drawing
RDK_BUILD_QT_SUPPORT:BOOL=OFF

//build shared libraries using rpath
RDK_BUILD_RPATH_SUPPORT:BOOL=OFF

//include support for the SLN format
RDK_BUILD_SLN_SUPPORT:BOOL=ON

//build in support for the StructChecker alpha (not recommended,
// use the MolVS integration instead)
RDK_BUILD_STRUCTCHECKER_SUPPORT:BOOL=OFF

//build the experimental SWIG C# wrappers (does nothing if RDK_BUILD_SWIG_WRAPPERS
// is not set)
RDK_BUILD_SWIG_CSHARP_WRAPPER:BOOL=OFF

//build the SWIG JAVA wrappers (does nothing if RDK_BUILD_SWIG_WRAPPERS
// is not set)
RDK_BUILD_SWIG_JAVA_WRAPPER:BOOL=ON

//build the SWIG wrappers
RDK_BUILD_SWIG_WRAPPERS:BOOL=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
RDK_BUILD_TESTS:UNINITIALIZED=OFF

//Build the gzip'd stream test
RDK_BUILD_TEST_GZIP:BOOL=OFF

//enable thread-safe substructure searching
RDK_BUILD_THREADSAFE_SSS:BOOL=ON

//build in support for the RDKit's implementation of xyz2mol (in
// the DetermineBonds library)
RDK_BUILD_XYZ2MOL_SUPPORT:BOOL=OFF

//build support for the YAeHMOP wrapper
RDK_BUILD_YAEHMOP_SUPPORT:BOOL=OFF

//statically link rdkit libraries into the cffi wrapper
RDK_CFFI_STATIC:BOOL=ON

//the external libraries
RDK_CHEMDRAWREACTION_LIBS:STRING=RDChemDrawReactinoLib

//the external libraries
RDK_CHEMDRAW_LIBS:STRING=RDChemDrawLib

//the external libraries
RDK_COORDGEN_LIBS:STRING=coordgen

//download and install comic-neue to maximize the "utility" of
// the comic mode in MolDraw2D
RDK_INSTALL_COMIC_FONTS:BOOL=ON

//install libraries and headers
RDK_INSTALL_DEV_COMPONENT:BOOL=ON

//install the rdkit DLLs when using MSVC
RDK_INSTALL_DLLS_MSVC:BOOL=OFF

//install the rdkit in the source tree (former behavior)
RDK_INSTALL_INTREE:BOOL=ON

//install the rdkit Python tests with the wrappers
RDK_INSTALL_PYTHON_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//install the rdkit static libraries
RDK_INSTALL_STATIC_LIBS:BOOL=ON

//the external libraries
RDK_MAEPARSER_LIBS:STRING=maeparser

//build the minimal RDKit JS wrapper such that it supports legacy
// browsers
RDK_MINIMAL_LIB_SUPPORT_LEGACY_BROWSERS:BOOL=OFF

//Use SSE4.2 popcount instruction while compiling.
RDK_OPTIMIZE_POPCNT:BOOL=ON

//enable the sortsupport method in the PostgreSQL bfp gist index
RDK_PGSQL_BFP_GIST_SORTSUPPORT:BOOL=OFF

//enable the sortsupport method in the PostgreSQL mol gist index
RDK_PGSQL_MOL_GIST_SORTSUPPORT:BOOL=ON

//enable the sortsupport method in the PostgreSQL qmol gist index
RDK_PGSQL_QMOL_GIST_SORTSUPPORT:BOOL=ON

//statically link rdkit libraries into the PostgreSQL cartridge
RDK_PGSQL_STATIC:BOOL=ON

//statically link rdkit libraries into the SWIG wrappers
RDK_SWIG_STATIC:BOOL=ON

//Use G(L)COV to compute test coverage
RDK_TEST_COVERAGE:BOOL=OFF

//run MMFF compliance tests (requires tar/gzip)
RDK_TEST_MMFF_COMPLIANCE:BOOL=ON

//run some tests of multithreading
RDK_TEST_MULTITHREADED:BOOL=ON

//the libraries for the URF calculation
RDK_URF_LIBS:STRING=RingDecomposerLib

//use boost::iostreams
RDK_USE_BOOST_IOSTREAMS:BOOL=ON

//Use the boost serialization library if available
RDK_USE_BOOST_SERIALIZATION:BOOL=ON

//use boost::stacktrace to do more verbose invariant output (linux
// only)
RDK_USE_BOOST_STACKTRACE:BOOL=ON

//use flex/bison, if available, to build the SMILES/SMARTS/SLN
// parsers
RDK_USE_FLEXBISON:BOOL=OFF

//Use Qt6 instead of Qt5
RDK_USE_QT6:BOOL=OFF

//Use the most strict rotatable bond definition
RDK_USE_STRICT_ROTOR_DEFINITION:BOOL=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
RDKit_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/nick/rdkit-ocaml/build/rdkit

//Value Computed by CMake
RDKit_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
RDKit_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/nick/rdkit-ocaml/vendor/rdkit

//Name of the computer/site where compile is being run
SITE:STRING=Nick-Laptop

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for boost_headers.
boost_headers_DIR:PATH=/nix/store/jnaam8l47051mrm2wvqgr6nhn7gx06fx-boost-1.89.0-dev/lib/cmake/boost_headers-1.89.0

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for boost_iostreams.
boost_iostreams_DIR:PATH=/nix/store/jnaam8l47051mrm2wvqgr6nhn7gx06fx-boost-1.89.0-dev/lib/cmake/boost_iostreams-1.89.0

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for boost_random.
boost_random_DIR:PATH=/nix/store/jnaam8l47051mrm2wvqgr6nhn7gx06fx-boost-1.89.0-dev/lib/cmake/boost_random-1.89.0

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for boost_regex.
boost_regex_DIR:PATH=/nix/store/jnaam8l47051mrm2wvqgr6nhn7gx06fx-boost-1.89.0-dev/lib/cmake/boost_regex-1.89.0

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for boost_serialization.
boost_serialization_DIR:PATH=/nix/store/jnaam8l47051mrm2wvqgr6nhn7gx06fx-boost-1.89.0-dev/lib/cmake/boost_serialization-1.89.0

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for coordgen.
coordgen_DIR:PATH=coordgen_DIR-NOTFOUND

//CoordGen Include File
coordgen_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=/home/nick/rdkit-ocaml/vendor/rdkit/External/CoordGen

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for maeparser.
maeparser_DIR:PATH=maeparser_DIR-NOTFOUND

//MaeParser Include Dir
maeparser_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=/home/nick/rdkit-ocaml/vendor/rdkit/External/CoordGen

# INTERNAL cache entries
